description_long: This is a flat-screen television with a wide, rectangular display and a black, matte-finished bezel. The front features a vibrant screen currently displaying a movie scene, surrounded by a thin, uniform bezel. The television is supported by a broad, flat pedestal stand that provides stability. The rear panel is equipped with ventilation grilles, a central mounting area, and several visible ports and labels, indicating connectivity options. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with a focus on maximizing screen area while keeping the frame slim. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metal reinforcement and glass for the display.
description: A modern flat-screen television with a thin black bezel, wide display, and a sturdy pedestal stand. The rear panel features ventilation and connectivity ports.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the vibrant display, thin black bezel, and the pedestal stand.
description_view_1: Front angled view from the opposite side, highlighting the screen and slim bezel.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back panel with ventilation grilles, mounting area, and visible ports.
description_view_3: Rear angled view from the opposite side, emphasizing the back panel details and stand attachment.
attribute_bezel_design: thin, black, matte plastic bezel with a uniform width around the screen
